Home and renters coverage gap calculator

Estimate personal property, additional living expense, liability, and flood gaps.

Use this educational worksheet to estimate a planning range, then verify details with official sources or a licensed professional.

    Send the result to your inbox and allow educational follow-up. A copy is sent to the site owner for follow-up only after consent.

    Estimate personal property, additional living expense, liability, and flood gaps.

    Sources

    1. CFPB Homeowners Insurance (CFPB)
    2. FEMA Flood Insurance (FEMA)
    3. FEMA Seguro de Inundacion (FEMA)
    4. NAIC Consumer Guide to Home Insurance (NAIC)
